name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each directly to bank account
eligibility: All landholding farmer families with cultivable land
how_to_apply: Apply at pmkisan.gov.in or visit nearest CSC centre with Aadhaar, land records, and bank passbook

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
benefits: Crop insurance at low premium — 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for commercial/horticultural crops
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas, including sharecroppers and tenant farmers
how_to_apply: Apply through bank, CSC, or pmfby.gov.in before sowing season deadline

name: PM Kisan Maandhan Yojana
benefits: ₹3,000/month pension after age 60
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers aged 18-40 with cultivable land up to 2 hectares
how_to_apply: Register at maandhan.in or visit CSC with Aadhaar and bank details

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
benefits: Free soil testing and nutrient-based recommendations for improving crop productivity
eligibility: All farmers
how_to_apply: Contact nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra or agriculture department office

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
benefits: Free LPG connection with ₹1,600 subsidy for first cylinder and deposit-free connection
eligibility: Women from BPL households, SC/ST, PMAY beneficiaries, most backward classes, tea garden/forest dwellers
how_to_apply: Apply at nearest LPG distributor with BPL card, Aadhaar, and bank passbook

name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Health insurance cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization
eligibility: Families identified via SECC 2011 data — deprived rural and identified urban worker families
how_to_apply: Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in or visit empanelled hospital with Aadhaar/ration card

name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
benefits: ₹1.20 lakh (plains) or ₹1.30 lakh (hilly areas) for construction of pucca house
eligibility: Houseless or living in kutcha/dilapidated house, as per SECC 2011 data
how_to_apply: Identified through SECC data; contact Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office

name: PM Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefits: Interest subsidy of 3-6.5% on home loans up to ₹6-12 lakh for EWS/LIG/MIG categories
eligibility: EWS (income up to ₹3 lakh), LIG (₹3-6 lakh), MIG-I (₹6-12 lakh), MIG-II (₹12-18 lakh)
how_to_apply: Apply through pmaymis.gov.in or visit nearest CSC/ULB office

name: Mahatma Gandhi NREGA
benefits: 100 days of guaranteed wage employment per year to rural households
eligibility: Any adult member of a rural household willing to do unskilled manual work
how_to_apply: Register at Gram Panchayat with application; get Job Card within 15 days

name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) - Old Age Pension
benefits: ₹200-500/month central pension (states may add more) for elderly BPL citizens
eligibility: Age 60+ and belonging to BPL household
how_to_apply: Apply through Gram Panchayat/ULB with age proof, BPL card, and bank details

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
benefits: High-interest savings account (8.2%) for girl child, tax-free maturity, minimum ₹250/year deposit
eligibility: Girl child below 10 years of age; max 2 accounts per family
how_to_apply: Open account at any post office or authorized bank with birth certificate and parent's ID

name: PM Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
benefits: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh — Shishu (up to ₹50K), Kishore (₹50K-5L), Tarun (₹5L-10L)
eligibility: Any Indian citizen with a business plan for non-farm income-generating activity
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank, NBFC, or MFI with business plan and ID documents

name: Stand-Up India
benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services, or trading
eligibility: SC/ST or women entrepreneurs for first-time projects
how_to_apply: Apply at standupmitra.in or visit any scheduled commercial bank branch

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Recognition as Vishwakarma, skill training, toolkit incentive of ₹15,000, collateral-free loans up to ₹3 lakh
eligibility: Traditional artisans and craftspeople working in 18 identified trades (carpenter, blacksmith, goldsmith, potter, etc.)
how_to_apply: Register at pmvishwakarma.gov.in through CSC with Aadhaar and trade verification

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
benefits: Guaranteed pension of ₹1,000-5,000/month after age 60, based on contribution
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-40 with a savings bank account, not covered by any statutory social security scheme
how_to_apply: Apply through bank where you have savings account; auto-debit contribution monthly

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
benefits: Zero-balance bank account, RuPay debit card, ₹2 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life cover, overdraft up to ₹10,000
eligibility: Any Indian citizen aged 10+ without a bank account
how_to_apply: Visit any bank branch or banking correspondent with Aadhaar/ID proof

name: National Education Policy - PM SHRI Schools
benefits: Upgraded school infrastructure, smart classrooms, labs, and NEP-2020 aligned pedagogy in 14,500+ schools
eligibility: Students enrolled in PM SHRI selected schools (government and aided schools)
how_to_apply: Schools selected by government; check with district education office for nearest PM SHRI school

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
benefits: Accidental death and disability cover of ₹2 lakh at just ₹20/year premium
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-70 with a bank account
how_to_apply: Auto-debit enrollment through bank; submit form at your bank branch

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
benefits: Life insurance cover of ₹2 lakh at ₹436/year premium
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-50 with a bank account
how_to_apply: Auto-debit enrollment through bank; submit form at your bank branch

name: Digital India - Common Service Centres (CSC)
benefits: Access to 400+ government and private services at village level — banking, insurance, pension, certificates, bill payments
eligibility: All citizens; VLE (Village Level Entrepreneur) opportunity for anyone with basic infrastructure
how_to_apply: Visit nearest CSC (csc.gov.in/locator) or apply to become VLE at register.csc.gov.in
